prompt: Place one minecraft:birch_planks block at absolute coordinates (x=-2, y=64, z=-1).
Place one minecraft:oak_planks block at absolute coordinates (x=1, y=64, z=4).
A minecraft:red_wool reference block is at (-3, 64, -4). Place one minecraft:deepslate_bricks block 3 blocks east of that reference.
Place one minecraft:deepslate_bricks block 1 blocks behind you.
Build a flat minecraft:birch_planks floor covering x=-2..0 and z=-1..2 at y=64.
Build a straight minecraft:stone_bricks wall from x=-2 to x=4 at z=-2. The wall should run from y=64 through y=66.

There is an oak plank room with exactly one doorway. Place one minecraft:lantern on the floor tile immediately inside the doorway. An extra stone pillar is nearby, but it does not matter for this task.

Colored wool markers are placed nearby. An extra stone pillar is nearby, but it does not matter for this task.

A stone_bricks wall has a 1-block-wide doorway near the center. Widen the doorway to 3 blocks wide while preserving all other wall blocks. A separate cobblestone marker sits off to the side and is irrelevant to this task.
Move the existing 2-by-2 window from the west wall to the east wall of the room. Seal the old opening with stone_bricks.

Two stone towers are already built nearby. Do not build new towers or change the existing towers. Start directly above the west tower top, run straight east until you are aligned with the east tower, then turn once and continue along z until the bridge ends directly above the east tower top. Do not place any cobblestone on or inside the towers themselves. A separate cobblestone marker sits off to the side and is irrelevant to this task.

Two stone_bricks rooms with existing doorways are already built nearby. Do not rebuild or modify the rooms. Build only the missing one-block-wide L-shaped stone_bricks corridor shell between the two doorways, including the corridor floor, side walls, and roof. Leave the interior passage empty.
